discounts.title: 3 Months Free on Pro Plan
discounts.description: Get 3 months free on Supabase Pro — includes dedicated Postgres database, auth, file storage, edge functions, and realtime subscriptions. No credit card required for trial.

discounts.title: 20% Off Pro Plan — First Year
discounts.description: Deploy frontend apps instantly with Vercel Pro. Includes 1TB bandwidth, unlimited serverless functions, preview deployments, and team collaboration. 20% off your first year.

discounts.title: Free Scale Plan for 2 Months
discounts.description: Neon is serverless Postgres with branching, autoscaling to zero, and instant provisioning. The Scale plan includes 50GB storage and 750 compute hours/month — free for 2 months.

discounts.title: 30% Off Team Plan
discounts.description: Catch errors before users do. Sentry's Team plan includes error monitoring, performance tracing, session replay, and 50M events/month. Supports all major languages and frameworks.

discounts.title: 1 Year Free on Pro Plan
discounts.description: Email API built for developers. Resend Pro includes 50,000 emails/month, custom domains, webhooks, React Email support, and team access. 1 year free with this offer.

discounts.title: 25% Off Pro — 6 Months
discounts.description: Drop-in auth with pre-built UI components. Clerk Pro supports social OAuth, passkeys, MFA, organizations, and custom sessions. Works with Next.js, Remix, Expo, and more.

discounts.title: First $10K in Revenue, Fee Waived
discounts.description: Stripe waives processing fees on your first $10,000 in revenue when you sign up through Maple. Build subscriptions, one-time payments, invoices, and more using Stripe's APIs.

discounts.title: 3 Months Free on Pro
discounts.description: Serverless Redis and Kafka with per-request pricing. Upstash Pro gives you higher throughput, persistence, and no idle costs. Great for rate limiting, caching, and queues.

discounts.title: 50% Off Scaler Plan — 3 Months
discounts.description: MySQL-compatible serverless database with schema branching, non-blocking schema changes, and query insights. The Scaler plan handles 1B row reads and 10M row writes/month.

discounts.title: 2 Months Free on Workers Paid
discounts.description: Run code at the edge in 300+ locations. Cloudflare Workers Paid includes 10M requests/day, Workers KV, Durable Objects, and R2 object storage — 2 months free.

discounts.title: 3 Months Free on Scaler Plan
discounts.description: SQLite at the edge with libSQL. Turso Scaler includes 10,000 databases, 100GB storage, and embedded replicas for ultra-low latency reads anywhere. Perfect for multi-tenant apps.

discounts.title: 2 Months Free on Pro
discounts.description: Open-source background jobs and workflows built for developers. Run long-running tasks, scheduled jobs, and event-driven workflows with full TypeScript support and local dev.
